column1: To make predictions on a new table, T, use: yfit = c.predictFcn(T) replacing 'c' with the name of the variable that is this struct, e.g. 'trainedModel'. The table, T, must contain the variables returned by: c.RequiredVariables Variable formats (e.g. matrix/vector, datatype) must match the original training data. Additional variables are ignored. For more information, see How to predict using an exported model.
